questions: GPT-4 ki GPT-3 er theke better?
GPT ar BERT er difference ki?
OpenAI er GPT model explain koro
answers: GPT stands for Generative Pre-trained Transformer. It's a decoder-only model that generates text by predicting the next token. OpenAI has released GPT-2, GPT-3, GPT-3.5, GPT-4, and beyond.
GPT holo OpenAI er language model ja text generate korte pare. Eta autoregressive — mane ekta ekta word predict kore. GPT-4 multimodal — text ar image duitai process korte pare.
GPT models are trained on massive text data using next-token prediction. Each version has been larger and more capable. GPT-4 shows remarkable reasoning, coding, and creative abilities.
The GPT series revolutionized AI. Unlike BERT which understands text bidirectionally, GPT generates text left-to-right. It powers ChatGPT and has become the foundation for many AI applications.
